title: Trump pursues Iranian decapitation without a plan for what comes next
author: Greg Miller, Karen DeYoung
fullText: The U.S. has a fraught track record of toppling autocratic regimes and securing peaceful democracies — even when it has vision for the day after.
summary: The U.S. has a fraught track record of toppling autocratic regimes and securing peaceful democracies — even when it has vision for the day after.
